name: crowe-logic-vscode
description: Re-skins VS Code as Crowe Code: themes, product icons, walkthrough, and the Crowe Logic AI chat persona.

walkthroughs.title: Welcome to Crowe Code
walkthroughs.description: A premium AI workstation built on the CroweLM stack.

steps.title: Open the Crowe Logic chat
steps.description:
Click the gold mark in the activity bar to reveal the dedicated Crowe Logic chat panel — your face avatar, model selector, real-time tool calls, no Microsoft chrome.
[Open Chat](command:crowe-logic.openChat)

steps.title: Pick a model tier
steps.description:
52 routed CroweLM models across Anthropic Opus, NVIDIA NIM, Azure OpenAI. Auto-routing picks the right tier per task; pick manually when you want control.
[Pick Model](command:crowe-logic.pickModel)

steps.title: Use the Crowe Logic CLI
steps.description:
The same agent identity in your terminal. Press `Cmd+Shift+\`` to open it, or pick `Crowe Logic` from the terminal profiles dropdown.
[Open CLI](command:crowe-logic.openCli)

steps.title: Sign in with your API key
steps.description:
Don't have an account? [Start free at crowelogic.com](https://crowelogic.com/start-free) — 750 credits, no card. Then run **Sign In** and paste your `crowe_pat_…` token.
[Sign In](command:crowe-logic.signIn)

steps.title: Apply the Crowe Logic theme + icons
steps.description:
One command applies the gold-on-graphite palette, the icon theme, and the title bar text in one shot.
[Apply Full Rebrand](command:crowe-logic.applyAll)

chatParticipants.name: crowe-logic
chatParticipants.description: Crowe Logic agent powered by the CroweLM model chain

croweLogic.autoApplyOnFirstRun.description: Apply the Crowe Logic theme and product icons automatically the first time the extension activates.

croweLogic.titleBarText.description: Override window.title with a Crowe Logic-branded format.

croweLogic.foundryBaseURL.description: Base URL of the Crowe Logic Foundry control plane (e.g. https://api.crowelogic.com or http://localhost:8001 for local dev).

croweLogic.model.description: Model id to send to the foundry. Use 'auto' to let the foundry pick from MODEL_CHAIN.
